zh.lifeSummary: 當Waléran Ier de Luxembourg-Ligny於1246年出生在比利時納姆爾利尼時，他的父親Henri de Luxembourg V30歲，母親Marguerite de Bar26歲。他於1262年4月23日與Jeanne de Beauvoir在法國諾門迪曼其波奧沃易結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1288年6月5日在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可爾沃林根享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Waléran Ier de Luxembourg-Ligny于1246年出生在比利时納姆爾利尼时，他的父亲Henri de Luxembourg V30岁，母亲Marguerite de Bar26岁。他于1262年4月23日与Jeanne de Beauvoir在法国諾門迪曼其波奧沃易结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1288年6月5日在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可爾沃林根享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Waléran
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Walburn
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + burg ‘stronghold’. St Walburg ( d. ?779 ) was of Anglo-Saxon origin, and the original form of her name was Wealdburh or Wealburh. She became abbess of Heidenheim and her relics are preserved at Eichstatt.

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Yiddish ber ‘bear’, probably influenced by the early medieval European practice of giving animal names to people. It is often paired with Dov in order to provide a Hebrew name in certain rituals.

en.lifeSummary: When Waléran Ier de Luxembourg-Ligny was born in 1246, in Ligny, Namur, Belgium, his father, Henri de Luxembourg V, was 30 and his mother, Marguerite de Bar, was 26. He married Jeanne de Beauvoir on 23 April 1262, in Beauvoir, Manche, Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 5 June 1288, in Worringen, Köln, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Waléran Ier de Luxembourg-Ligny est né en 1246, à Ligny, Namur, Belgique, son père, Henri de Luxembourg V, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Bar, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Beauvoir le 23 avril 1262, à Beauvoir, Manche, Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 5 juin 1288, à Worringen, Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Waléran Ier de Luxembourg-Ligny 1246 in Ligny, Namen, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henri de Luxembourg V 30 und seine Mutter Marguerite de Bar 26. Er hat am 23. April 1262 in Beauvoir, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich Jeanne de Beauvoir geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 5. Juni 1288 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Worringen, Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Waléran Ier de Luxembourg-Ligny è nato il nel 1246 nel Ligny, Namur, Belgio, il suo padre, Henri de Luxembourg V, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite de Bar, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de Beauvoir il 23 aprile 1262, nel Beauvoir, Manche, Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 5 giugno 1288, nel Worringen, Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Waléran Ier de Luxembourg-Lignyが1246年にベルギーナムルリグニーで生まれた時，父Henri de Luxembourg Vは30歳，母Marguerite de Barは26歳であった。1262年4月23日にフランスノーマンディマンチェビーウボイルでJeanne de Beauvoirと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1288年6月5日にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクoルンウオリンジェンで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Waléran Ier de Luxembourg-Ligny(이)가 1246년 벨기에 남어 리그니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henri de Luxembourg V(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite de Bar(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1262년 4월 23일 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 보보이르에서 Jeanne de Beauvoir(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1288년 6월 5일 독일 노르드하이-베스트파렌 ko 워링에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Waléran Ier de Luxembourg-Ligny nasceu em 1246, em Ligny, Namur, Bélgica, seu pai, Henri de Luxembourg V, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Bar, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Beauvoir em 23 de abril de 1262, em Beauvoir, Manche, Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 5 de junho de 1288, em Worringen, Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Waléran Ier de Luxembourg-Ligny родился в 1246 г. в местности лигни, намур, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Henri de Luxembourg V было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Bar, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Beauvoir 23 апреля 1262 г. в местности бовоир, манч, норманди, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 5 июня 1288 г. в местности ворринген, кoлн, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Waléran Ier de Luxembourg-Ligny nació en 1246, en Ligny, Namur, Bélgica, su papá, Henri de Luxembourg V, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Bar, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Jeanne de Beauvoir el 23 de abril de 1262, en Beauvoir, Manche, Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 5 de junio de 1288, en Worringen, Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, a la edad de 42 años.
